necessityProof.blockerResolved: N1 must finish coherent archive renderer families before Phase-B can merge thin renderers and before N5 can lower file-count and unused-code ratchets.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: Operator lifecycle and runtime gate archive reports become direct Phase-B candidates because their renderers now only declare builder specs and raw archive-reference lines.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The v2114 builder already supports entries, messages, lists, and raw lines. Archive reference filtering remains in the renderer spec as a raw lines section, avoiding a new archive-specific builder API.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: The batch stops at seven no-helper operator lifecycle/live-read/approval-gate renderers; runtime pass evidence, shard readiness, minimal integration, sandbox handle, and fake transport renderers remain separate batches.

focusedRendererBatch.command: npx vitest run test/verificationReportBuilder.test.ts test/governanceGrowthRatchet.test.ts and 7 operator lifecycle/runtime gate archive verification test files --testTimeout=180000

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Temporary Vitest test loaded legacy renderer source from git HEAD, rewired imports to current source modules, loaded real fallback profiles, and asserted equality with each migrated renderer output.

lint.note: Warnings are the existing v2115 baseline and are outside this renderer-consolidation batch.

archiveDeliverables: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2093-renderer-consolidation-batch-5-v2122.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2122 only changes Node markdown rendering for frozen archive profiles; it does not request fresh sibling evidence, live integration, or upstream service startup.
